posts.author: Theresa (Theresa Ingerson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there any way items can be moved to the top of a group via an Automation?

Background:
We love using Monday for our task and project management within our business.

To streamline processes, we have automations set up to move items from one group to another based on the status.
For example, when an item was completed and the status is changed to “Done”, the task is automatically moved to a “Tasks completed this week” group.

We currently work on a “newest first” basis which means the latest completed updates should be at the top of the list instead of the bottom.

Unfortunately, the automations end up moving items to the end of the other group.
With long list of items under each group, this becomes less usefull the further down the newest item is.
